ns0:entry.ns0:title: Agent-Field/agentfield
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Agent-Field/agentfield
Language: go
Build, run and scale AI agents like API and microservices - observable,auditable and identity-aware from day one.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Billionmail/BillionMail
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Billionmail/BillionMail
Language: go
BillionMail gives you open-source MailServer, NewsLetter, Email Marketing — fully self-hosted, dev-friendly, and free from monthly fees. Join the discord: https://discord.gg/asfXzBUhZr

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BishopFox/cloudfox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BishopFox/cloudfox
Language: go
Automating situational awareness for cloud penetration tests.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: XTLS/Xray-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core
Language: go
Xray, Penetrates Everything. Also the best v2ray-core. Where the magic happens. An open platform for various uses.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aquasecurity/trivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy
Language: go
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd

ns0:entry.ns0:title: asheshgoplani/agent-deck
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/asheshgoplani/agent-deck
Language: go
Terminal session manager for AI coding agents. One TUI for Claude, Gemini, OpenCode, Codex, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bluenviron/mediamtx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bluenviron/mediamtx
Language: go
Ready-to-use Media-over-QUIC / SRT / WebRTC / RTSP / RTMP / LL-HLS / MPEG-TS / RTP live media server and media proxy that allows to read, publish, proxy, record and playback real-time video and audio streams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: krillinai/KrillinAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/krillinai/KrillinAI
Language: go
AI video translation & dubbing tool for humans and AI Agents, powered by LLMs. Full pipeline: download, transcribe, translate, TTS dub, reformat, cover generation. 100+ languages, optimized for YouTube, TikTok, Bilibili, Douyin, and more.AI视频翻译配音工具，面向人类与AI Agent，100+语言全链路，CLI分阶段调用，适配抖音、小红书、哔哩哔哩、视频号、TikTok、YouTube

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes/kubernetes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes
Language: go
Production-Grade Container Scheduling and Management

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Connect your devices into a secure WireGuard®-based overlay network with SSO, MFA and granular access controls.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: weaviate/weaviate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate
Language: go
Weaviate is an open-source vector database that stores both objects and vectors, allowing for the combination of vector search with structured filtering with the fault tolerance and scalability of a cloud-native database​.
